scripts.build: tsc --project tsconfig.json && esbuild src/handlers/websocket-sync.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --external:@aws-sdk/client-dynamodb --external:@aws-sdk/client-apigatewaymanagementapi --outfile=../../.build/handlers/websocket-sync.js && esbuild src/handlers/get-jobs-changes.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --external:@prisma/client --external:@demand-letter/db --outfile=../../.build/handlers/get-jobs-changes.js && esbuild src/handlers/delete-jobs-changes.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --external:@prisma/client --external:@demand-letter/db --outfile=../../.build/handlers/delete-jobs-changes.js && esbuild src/handlers/post-jobs-export-docx.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --external:@prisma/client --external:@demand-letter/db --outfile=../../.build/handlers/post-jobs-export-docx.js && esbuild src/handlers/get-jobs-export-docx.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --external:@prisma/client --external:@demand-letter/db --outfile=../../.build/handlers/get-jobs-export-docx.js
